name: GPT-5.6 Sol
archDisplay: Undisclosed architecture (presumed dense transformer); flagship tier of the three durable capability tiers Sol/Terra/Luna, each tracked as its own corpus model (like Claude Opus/Sonnet/Haiku)
note: Flagship (Sol) tier of the three-tier GPT-5.6 family, billed as OpenAI's best coding model yet (Terminal-Bench 2.1 SOTA); limited-preview June 26 under US govt review, GA July 9, 2026. Sibling tiers GPT-5.6 Terra and GPT-5.6 Luna are tracked as their own corpus models in the same family (OpenAI: 'durable capability tiers that can advance on their own cadence').
